chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 252 of 2024: Imtiaz Ahmed Bhatti vs. Province of Sindh & others. Petitioner: In-person. For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General. Date of hearing: 15.05.2024. Date of order: 15.05.2024. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The order sheet dated 17.04.2024 lists “for hearing of main case” at serial number 5. At serial number 5 the order reads “Dismissed being misconceived”. Per petitioner, the dismissal order is a clerical error. We find it inopportune to ascribe any meaning to the order other than the plain meaning thereof. Petitioner remained at liberty to prefer a review or appeal. Office to take note that this is a disposed off matter and may be treated accordingly. Judge Judge
